description: MCTS-TD Memory hooks — Setup daemon, SessionStart load memory, SessionEnd consolidate

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const base=os.homedir()+'/.claude/plugins/cache';const names=['mcts','mcts-td-planner'];let p=null;for(const n of names){const d=path.join(base,n,n);if(fs.existsSync(d)){p=d;break}}if(!p){console.log('[MCTS-TD] Plugin cache not found');process.exit(0)}const vers=fs.readdirSync(p).filter(x=>/^\d/.test(x)).sort();const s=path.join(p,vers[vers.length-1],'scripts/agent_daemon.js');if(fs.existsSync(s)){require('child_process').execSync('node \"'+s+'\" start > /dev/null 2>&1 \u0026');console.log('[MCTS-TD] Agent daemon started')}else{console.log('[MCTS-TD] Agent daemon starting...')}"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const base=os.homedir()+'/.claude/plugins/cache';const names=['mcts','mcts-td-planner'];let cache=null;for(const n of names){const d=path.join(base,n,n);if(fs.existsSync(d)){cache=d;break}}if(!cache){process.exit(0)}const dirs=fs.readdirSync(cache).filter(d=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(d)).sort((a,b)=>{const[a1,a2,a3]=a.split('.').map(Number);const[b1,b2,b3]=b.split('.').map(Number);return b1-a1||b2-a2||b3-a3});const latest=dirs[0];for(const d of dirs.slice(1)){fs.rmSync(path.join(cache,d),{recursive:true,force:true})};console.log('[MCTS-TD] Ready v'+latest);(function(){try{const io=require(path.join(cache,latest,'scripts/mma/io'));const kg=io.loadMMA();if(kg.meta.total_points>0){console.log('[MCTS-TD] Memory loaded: '+kg.meta.total_points+' points across '+(Object.keys(kg.meridians).filter(k=>kg.meridians[k].points.length>0).length)+' meridians')}else{console.log('[MCTS-TD] Cold start')}}catch(e){}})()"
